item.title: Clear as day, FAM at fault in forgery case, says MP

item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: Spurs slip deeper into relegation trouble after loss to Palace
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: Pearly-Thinaah enter All England semis after revenge win
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: Qualifier Parry ends Venus’s desert dream
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
Venus Williams rallied from a set and a break down to force a third set, but Diane Parry stormed through the decider for a 6-3, 6-7 (4/7), 6-1 triumph.

item.title: Iran’s World Cup uncertainty leaves Tucson training facility in limbo
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
Iran is supposed to play its World Cup group matches in the US — two in Los Angeles, one in Seattle — using Tucson’s Kino Sports Complex as its base camp from June 11 to July 19.

item.title: Kane-less Bayern brush aside Gladbach to continue title march
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: FAM to face AFC disciplinary panel over heritage player case
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
